name: Meeting Status Sync and RSVP Guard

parameters.content:
## W12A: Meeting Status Sync / Outlook RSVP Guard

✅ [STATUS REDACTED — configure after import]

Purpose: Syncs live Outlook calendar status to Salesforce Meeting_Reminder_Tracker__c.
Does NOT send emails. Does NOT mark reminder sent flags.
Does NOT delete Salesforce records.

Schedule: every 30 min
testMode: false (production)
batchLimit: 50
Credential: Microsoft Outlook account (Example User only)
Lookup: iCalUId eq Outlook_Event_ID__c (Method A)

Outcomes:
  cancelled  → Meeting_Status__c = Cancelled + Last_Synced__c + Review_Notes__c (ONLY case that blocks reminders)
  timechange → sync start/end/reminder times  + Last_Synced__c + Review_Notes__c
  lastsynced (RSVP issue) → Last_Synced__c + neutral Review_Notes__c — reminders still allowed
  lastsynced (clean) → Last_Synced__c ONLY — Review_Notes__c untouched

RSVP declined/tentative/none/not-found does NOT set Declined or block reminders.

Fields NEVER written: X24_Hour_Reminder_Sent__c, X1_Hour_Reminder_Sent__c,
X24_Hour_Reminder_Task_Created__c, X1_Hour_Reminder_Task_Created__c

Zero-event guard: Fetch Outlook Event has alwaysOutputData=true
so Process Outlook Status always runs even when Outlook returns 0 events.
This ensures deleted/missing events are correctly marked Cancelled.
